headline: 3 Reasons to Sell DOV and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Dover has followed the market’s trajectory closely, rising in tandem with the S&P 500 over the past six months. The stock has climbed by 13.7% to $222.51 per share while the index has gained 9.3%.
